zh.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙姆爾坡斯托福
zh.Llanthony Secunda Priory, Hempsted, Glou: 英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey III de Bohun於1144年之前出生在英國維爾爾時，他的父親Humphrey II de Bohun34歲，母親Margaret of Gloucester20歲。他於1171年5月與Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭被列為constable of england。他去世於1181年12月在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾坡斯托福，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

zh-hans.Hereford, HEF, England: 英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德
zh-hans.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯蒙姆爾坡斯托福
zh-hans.Llanthony Secunda Priory, Hempsted, Glou: 英国格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey III de Bohun于1144年之前出生在英国維爾爾时，他的父亲Humphrey II de Bohun34岁，母亲Margaret of Gloucester20岁。他于1171年5月与Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰被列为constable of england。他去世于1181年12月在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾坡斯托福，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak (Behúň) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Behún): nickname from Slovak behúň (Rusyn bihun) ‘fast runner’.
Irish: from Ó Beachain or Ó Beathain, see Behan . This form of the surname is almost extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Behan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Conan, Aileen.
Irish (southern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beachain ‘descendant of Beachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of beach ‘bee’.
Irish (southern): perhaps from Ó Beathain ‘descendant of Beathán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare Bean 5 and McBeth .

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey III de Bohun was born before 1144, in Wiltshire, England, his father, Humphrey II de Bohun, was 34 and his mother, Margaret of Gloucester, was 20. He married Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford in May 1171, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as constable of england in England, United Kingdom. He died in December 1181, in Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey III de Bohun est né avant 1144, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey II de Bohun, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Gloucester, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford en mai 1171, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est constable of england à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en décembre 1181, à Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey III de Bohun vor 1144 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey II de Bohun 34 und seine Mutter Margaret of Gloucester 20. Er hat im Mai 1171 in England, United Kingdom Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als constable of england in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb im Dezember 1181 in Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

ht.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey III de Bohun è nato il prima del 1144 nel Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Humphrey II de Bohun, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret of Gloucester, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford nel maggio 1171, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come constable of england nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel dicembre 1181, nel Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey III de Bohunが1144年以前にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Humphrey II de Bohunは34歳，母Margaret of Gloucesterは20歳であった。1171年5月にイギリスイギリスでMargaret of Huntingdon Countess of Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスでの職業はconstable of englandと記録されている。彼は1181年12月にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアチェプストウで死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey III de Bohun(이)가 1144년 이전 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey II de Bohun(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret of Gloucester(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1171년 5월 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 constable of england이었다. 그는 1181년 12월 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 체프스타우에서 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey III de Bohun nasceu antes 1144, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey II de Bohun, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Gloucester, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford em maio de 1171, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como constable of england em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1181, em Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey III de Bohun родился перед 1144 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey II de Bohun было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Gloucester, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford май 1171 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии constable of england в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер декабрь 1181 г. в местности чепстоу, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия.

sm.1164-1176: mai le 1164 e o'o I le 1176
sm.from May 1171 to 1180: mai le Me 1171 e o'o I le 1180

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey III de Bohun nació antes de 1144, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey II de Bohun, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret of Gloucester, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret of Huntingdon Countess of Hereford en mayo de 1171, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era constable of england en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en diciembre de 1181, en Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
